title: PRODUCTION OPTIMISATION OF OIL WELLS EQUIPPED WITH SUCKER ROD PUMPS
author: Pavel Yanev
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: ABSTRACT. The article presents a procedure for production optimisation of brown oil wells produced periodically with sucker rod pumps. A characteristic feature of the methodology presented is that testing is done without interrupting the continuous work of the oil wells and without cut in oil and gas production. A principal procedure for conducting the testing is developed. The results from the test of the periodically produced oil wells are presented. Results are processed and analysed.
steps_raw: ABSTRACT. The article presents a procedure for production optimisation of brown oil wells produced periodically with sucker rod pumps. keywords: oil production, sucker rod pumps, oil
